subcodes.first_line: O ye candles in the nighttime sanctuary of God's love! Praise be unto God, the gates of bounty stand open, and the breasts of those with insight are adorned with signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمعهای شبستان محبت الله الحمد لله ابواب فضل مفتوح و صدور اهل فتوح بایات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
